name: Okeechobee Goat Cheese and Asparagus Roasted Pepper
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium Peppers: Red, Yellow and/or Green
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together eggs, yolks, and cream in a bowl.
2. Add thyme, coriander, cayenne pepper, and salt to the mixture; stir until combined.
3. Melt butter in a large skillet over low heat.
4. Add shallots and cook until translucent.
5. Add asparagus tips and peppers; cook until soft.
6. Set aside to cool.
7. Crumble goat cheese into pea-sized pieces; reserve 1/3 for later use.
8. Combine remaining goat cheese with the egg mixture, then add asparagus and peppers.
9. Butter ramekins, fill 3/4 full with the mixture.
10. Place ramekins onto a sheet pan filled with 1/4 inch of water.
11. Crumble remaining goat cheese over each timbale (ramekin).
12. Bake for 20 minutes; let rest before serving.
13. Serve with arugula on baby field greens.
